privileged_info_summary: The task relies on the agent synthetically creating a SeisComP map layer (BNA format) and configuration, so the data is considered synthetic. Verification confirmed the explicit target paths for the BNA file (/home/ga/.seiscomp/bna/noto_zone.bna), config file (/home/ga/.seiscomp/scmv.cfg), and agent screenshot (/home/ga/scmv_layer_verification.png) are accurately required by export and verifier scripts. The expected coordinate boundaries (Longitudes 136.6 to 137.5, Latitudes 37.1 to 37.5) and region name ('Noto Aftershock Zone') accurately reflect the explicit requirements defined in the task description and verifier logic.
